tool_args.label: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan listing recurring and specific agenda items by month

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Results - May 2025

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Summer of 2025.
This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2025.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work Programs - Switch Installations in West Side Yard

payload.description: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2026 Committee Work Plan - December 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.description: The President's Report is a recurring monthly report highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.subject: Safety Report
payload.description: The Safety Report is a recurring monthly report highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report
payload.description: The Financial Report compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report
payload.description: The Ridership Report compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
